message:
🌱 Add opentofu: feature: variabilize module source  mission (#831)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

+        "title": "Check OpenTofu installation",
+        "description": "Verify your OpenTofu version:\n```bash\ntofu version\n```\nThis feature requires OpenTofu installed locally. Install via `brew install opentofu` or download from https://opentofu.org/docs/intro/install/."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Understand the feature context",
+        "description": "module \"your_project\" {\n  source = \"${var.your_project_source}//<path>\"\n  ...\n}\n\nthis can help in monorepo collection of modules"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for feature: variabilize module source ",
+        "description": "Implements RFC #1042 [Static Evaluation](https://github.com/opentofu/opentofu/blob/main/rfc/20240513-static-evaluation.md)\nThis is a work in progress that builds on top of my prototyping over the past 6 months.\n\nNote: Input variable handing is a bit wonky as it's spread across a bunch of different packages.  This initial implementation will *not* prompt the user for missing variables and instead will print out an error.  A follow-up issue may be created to track the refactoring required to"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the feature is working as expected:\n```bash\ntofu version\ntofu validate\ntofu plan\n```\nConfirm that the feature described in \"feature: variabilize module source \" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Implements RFC #1042 [Static Evaluation](https://github.com/opentofu/opentofu/blob/main/rfc/20240513-static-evaluation.md)\nThis is a work in progress that builds on top of my prototyping over the past 6 months.\n\nNote: Input variable handing is a bit wonky as it's spread across a bunch of different packages.",
